create_ideas.configuration.title: Create: Ideas!
create_ideas.configuration.utility.toolt: Some practical new tools and adjustments for them.
create_ideas.configuration.portableStres: Allow to craft portable stressometer, as well as use it.
create_ideas.configuration.recipes.toolt: Some new recipes added and some tweaks for current recipes.
create_ideas.configuration.blastRecipesR: Enables direct blasting of block of raw copper, raw iron and raw gold. This also extends bulk blasting to process these raw ore blocks.
create_ideas.configuration.hauntingRecip: Enable the recipe for bulk haunting amethyst shard into echo shard.
Enable the recipe for bulk haunting bricks into red nether bricks.
Enable the recipe for bulk block of lapis into prismarine and prismarine crystals.
create_ideas.configuration.bulkProcessin: Allow to generate extra experience nugget when bulk item processing.
create_ideas.configuration.bulkBlastingE: Enable the feature for Bulk Blasting.
create_ideas.configuration.bulkSmokingEx: Enable the feature for Bulk Smoking.
lyricore.multiplayer.disconnect.unable_t: Unable to sync Create: Ideas! config with server
